{ Combobox, useListCollection } from '@ark-ui/react/combobox'\nimport { useFilter } from '@ark-ui/react/locale'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronsUpDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\nexport const Basic = () =\u003e {\n  const { contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems: [\n      { label: 'Apple', value: 'apple' },\n      { label: 'Banana', value: 'banana' },\n      { label: 'Orange', value: 'orange' },\n      { label: 'Mango', value: 'mango' },\n      { label: 'Pineapple', value: 'pineapple' },\n      { label: 'Strawberry', value: 'strawberry' },\n    ],\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root className={styles.Root} collection={collection} onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eFavorite Fruit\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Apple\" /\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.ClearTrigger className={styles.ClearTrigger}\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.ClearTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronsUpDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.Control\u003e\n      \u003cPortal\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            {collection.items.map((item) =\u003e (\n              \u003cCombobox.Item className={styles.Item} key={item.value} item={item}\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e{item.label}\u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                  \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Portal\u003e\n    \u003c/Combobox.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"124:T1609,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,".Root {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.375rem;\n  width: 100%;\n  max-width: 16rem;\n}\n\n.Label {\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n.Control {\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.Input {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  width: 100%;\n  min-width: 0;\n  height: 2.5rem;\n  padding: 0 0.75rem;\n  padding-right: 4rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  outline: none;\n  transition:\n    border-color 0.15s ease,\n    box-shadow 0.15s ease;\n\n  \u0026::placeholder {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus {\n    border-color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    opacity: 0.5;\n    filter: grayscale(100%);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-invalid] {\n    border-color: var(--demo-error);\n\n    \u0026:focus {\n      border-color: var(--demo-error);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--demo-error);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n.Indicators {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 50%;\n  right: 0.5rem;\n  transform: translateY(-50%);\n  display: flex;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 2px;\n}\n\n.Trigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ClearTrigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Content {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem;\n  min-width: var(--reference-width);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-md);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  max-height: min(var(--available-height, 300px), 300px);\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  outline: none;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroup {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n\n  \u0026 + \u0026 {\n    margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroupLabel {\n  padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.025em;\n}\n\n.Item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='checked'] {\n    color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n    opacity: 0.5;\n  }\n\n  \u0026 mark {\n    background: transparent;\n    color: inherit;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    text-decoration: underline;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemText {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.ItemIndicator {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Tags {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.Tag {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  line-height: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n  background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n}\n\n.TagPlaceholder {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  min-height: 24px;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.Status {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Spinner {\n  width: 1rem;\n  height: 1rem;\n  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n}\n\n.ItemTitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.ItemSubtitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Scroller {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  height: min(300px, var(--total-size));\n  max-height: var(--available-height, 300px);\n  overflow: auto;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes spin {\n  from {\n    transform: rotate(0deg);\n  }\n  to {\n    transform: rotate(360deg);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-out {\n  from {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"125:Tc88,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,":root {\n  /* Coral semantic tokens */\n  --demo-coral-solid: #eb5e41;\n  --demo-coral-emphasized: #de5045;\n  --demo-coral-muted: #ffdbda;\n  --demo-coral-subtle: #ffe5e4;\n  --demo-coral-fg: #c9453b;\n  --demo-coral-contrast: white;\n  --demo-coral-focus-ring: #ffb2a8;\n\n  /* Neutral semantic Combobox, useListCollection } from '@ark-ui/react/combobox'\nimport { useFilter } from '@ark-ui/react/locale'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronsUpDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\nexport const AutoHighlight = () =\u003e {\n  const { contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems: [\n      { label: 'Engineering', value: 'engineering' },\n      { label: 'Marketing', value: 'marketing' },\n      { label: 'Sales', value: 'sales' },\n      { label: 'Finance', value: 'finance' },\n      { label: 'Human Resources', value: 'hr' },\n      { label: 'Operations', value: 'operations' },\n      { label: 'Product', value: 'product' },\n      { label: 'Customer Success', value: 'customer-success' },\n      { label: 'Legal', value: 'legal' },\n      { label: 'Information Technology', value: 'information-technology' },\n      { label: 'Design', value: 'design' },\n    ],\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root\n      className={styles.Root}\n      collection={collection}\n      onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\n      inputBehavior=\"autohighlight\"\n    \u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eDepartment\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Engineering\" /\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.ClearTrigger className={styles.ClearTrigger}\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.ClearTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronsUpDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.Control\u003e\n      \u003cPortal\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            \u003cCombobox.Empty className={styles.Item}\u003eNo results found\u003c/Combobox.Empty\u003e\n            {collection.items.map((item) =\u003e (\n              \u003cCombobox.Item className={styles.Item} key={item.value} item={item}\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e{item.label}\u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                  \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Portal\u003e\n    \u003c/Combobox.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"127:T1609,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,".Root {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.375rem;\n  width: 100%;\n  max-width: 16rem;\n}\n\n.Label {\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n.Control {\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.Input {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  width: 100%;\n  min-width: 0;\n  height: 2.5rem;\n  padding: 0 0.75rem;\n  padding-right: 4rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  outline: none;\n  transition:\n    border-color 0.15s ease,\n    box-shadow 0.15s ease;\n\n  \u0026::placeholder {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus {\n    border-color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    opacity: 0.5;\n    filter: grayscale(100%);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-invalid] {\n    border-color: var(--demo-error);\n\n    \u0026:focus {\n      border-color: var(--demo-error);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--demo-error);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n.Indicators {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 50%;\n  right: 0.5rem;\n  transform: translateY(-50%);\n  display: flex;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 2px;\n}\n\n.Trigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ClearTrigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Content {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem;\n  min-width: var(--reference-width);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-md);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  max-height: min(var(--available-height, 300px), 300px);\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  outline: none;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroup {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n\n  \u0026 + \u0026 {\n    margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroupLabel {\n  padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.025em;\n}\n\n.Item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='checked'] {\n    color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n    opacity: 0.5;\n  }\n\n  \u0026 mark {\n    background: transparent;\n    color: inherit;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    text-decoration: underline;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemText {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.ItemIndicator {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Tags {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.Tag {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  line-height: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n  background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n}\n\n.TagPlaceholder {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  min-height: 24px;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.Status {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Spinner {\n  width: 1rem;\n  height: 1rem;\n  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n}\n\n.ItemTitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.ItemSubtitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Scroller {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  height: min(300px, var(--total-size));\n  max-height: var(--available-height, 300px);\n  overflow: auto;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes spin {\n  from {\n    transform: rotate(0deg);\n  }\n  to {\n    transform: rotate(360deg);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-out {\n  from {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Content {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem;\n  min-width: var(--reference-width);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-md);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  max-height: min(var(--available-height, 300px), 300px);\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  outline: none;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroup {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n\n  \u0026 + \u0026 {\n    margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroupLabel {\n  padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Tags {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.Tag {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  line-height: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n  background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  color:  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Spinner {\n  width: 1rem;\n  height: 1rem;\n  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n}\n\n.ItemTitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.ItemSubtitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: transform: rotate(0deg);\n  }\n  to {\n    transform: rotate(360deg);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n initialItems: [],\n    itemToString: (item) =\u003e item.name,\n    itemToValue: (item) =\u003e item.name,\n  })\n\n  const combobox = useCombobox({\n    collection,\n    defaultValue: ['C-3PO'],\n contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems: [\n      { label: 'John Smith', value: 'john-smith' },\n      { label: 'Jane Doe', value: 'jane-doe' },\n      { label: 'Bob Johnson', value: 'bob-johnson' },\n      { label: 'Alice Williams', value: 'alice-williams' },\n      { label: 'Charlie Brown', value: 'charlie-brown' },\n      { label: 'Diana Ross', value: 'diana-ross' },\n    ],\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root className={styles.Root} collection={collection} onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eAssignee\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e\n                  \u003cCombobox.Context\u003e\n                    {(context) =\u003e \u003cHighlight text={item.label} query={context.inputValue} ignoreCase /\u003e}\n                  \u003c/Combobox.Context\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n              \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n string\n  __new__?: boolean\n}\n\nconst NEW_OPTION_VALUE = '[[new]]'\nconst createNewOption = (value: string): Item =\u003e ({ label: value, value: NEW_OPTION_VALUE })\nconst isNewOptionValue = (value: string) =\u003e value === NEW_OPTION_VALUE\nconst replaceNewOptionValue = (values: string[], value: string) =\u003e\n  values.map((v) =\u003e (v === NEW_OPTION_VALUE ? value : v))\nconst getNewOptionData = (inputValue: string): Item =\u003e ({ label: inputValue, value: inputValue, __new__: true })\n\nexport const Creatable = () =\u003e {\n  const { contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter, upsert, update, remove } = useListCollection\u003cItem\u003e({\n    initialItems: [\n      { label: 'Bug', value: 'bug' },\n      { label: 'Feature', value: 'feature' },\n      { label: 'Enhancement', value: 'enhancement' },\n      { label: 'Documentation', value: 'docs' },\n    ],\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const isValidNewOption = (inputValue: string) =\u003e {\n    const exactOptionMatch = collection.filter((item) =\u003e item.toLowerCase() === inputValue.toLowerCase()).size \u003e 0\n    return !exactOptionMatch \u0026\u0026 inputValue.trim().length \u003e 0\n  }\n\n  const [selectedValue, setSelectedValue] = useState\u003cstring[]\u003e([])\n  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('')\n\n  const handleInputChange = ({ inputValue, reason }: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    if (reason === 'input-change' || reason === 'item-select') {\n      flushSync(() =\u003e {\n        if useAsyncList } from '@ark-ui/react/collection'\nimport { Combobox, createListCollection } from '@ark-ui/react/combobox'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronsUpDownIcon, LoaderIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { startTransition } from 'react'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\ninterface Movie {\n  id: string\n  title: string\n  year: number\n  director: string\n  genre: string\n}\n\nexport const AsyncSearch = () =\u003e {\n  const list = useAsyncList\u003cMovie\u003e({\n    async load({ filterText, signal }) {\n      if (!filterText) return { items: [] }\n\n      await new Promise((resolve) =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 300))\n\n      if (signal?.aborted) return { items: [] }\n\n      const items = allMovies.filter(\n        (movie) =\u003e\n          movie.title.toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase()) ||\n          movie.director.toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase()) ||\n          movie.genre.toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase()),\n      )\n\n      return { items }\n    },\n  })\n\n  const collection = createListCollection({\n    items: list.items,\n    itemToString: (item) =\u003e item.title,\n    itemToValue: (item) =\u003e item.id,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    if (details.reason === 'input-change') {\n      startTransition(() =\u003e {\n        list.setFilterText(details.inputValue)\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root className={styles.Root} collection={collection} onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eMovie\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Inception\" /\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.ClearTrigger className={styles.ClearTrigger}\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.ClearTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronsUpDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.Control\u003e\n      \u003cPortal\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            {list.loading ? (\n              \u003cdiv className={styles.Status}\u003e\n                \u003cLoaderIcon className={styles.Spinner} /\u003e\n                \u003cspan\u003eSearching...\u003c/span\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            ) : list.error ? (\n              \u003cdiv className={styles.Status}\u003e{list.error.message}\u003c/div\u003e\n            ) : list.items.length === 0 ? (\n              \u003cdiv className={styles.Status}\u003e\n                {list.filterText ? 'No results found' : 'Start typing to search movies...'}\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            ) : (\n              collection.items.map((movie) =\u003e (\n                \u003cCombobox.Item className={styles.Item} key={movie.id} item={movie}\u003e\n                  \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e\n                    \u003cspan className={styles.ItemTitle}\u003e{movie.title}\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003cspan className={styles.ItemSubtitle}\u003e\n                      {movie.year} · {movie.director}\n                    \u003c/span\u003e\n                  \u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                  \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                    \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                  \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n              ))\n            )}\n          \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Portal\u003e\n    \u003c/Combobox.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\nconst allMovies: Movie[] = [\n  { id: 'inception', title: 'Inception', year: 2010, director: 'Christopher Nolan', genre: 'Sci-Fi' },\n  { id: 'the-dark-knight', title: 'The Dark Knight', year: 2008, director: 'Christopher Nolan', genre: 'Action' },\n  { id: 'pulp-fiction', title: 'Pulp Fiction', year: 1994, director: 'Quentin Tarantino', genre: 'Crime' },\n  { id: 'the-godfather', title: 'The Godfather', year: 1972, director: 'Francis Ford Coppola', genre: 'Crime' },\n  { id: 'forrest-gump', title: 'Forrest Gump', year: 1994, director: 'Robert Zemeckis', genre: 'Drama' },\n  { id: 'the-matrix', title: 'The Matrix', year: 1999, director: 'The Wachowskis', genre: 'Sci-Fi' },\n  { id: 'interstellar', title: 'Interstellar', year: 2014, director: 'Christopher Nolan', genre: 'Sci-Fi' },\n  { id: 'parasite', title: 'Parasite', year: 2019, director: 'Bong Joon-ho', genre: 'Thriller' },\n  {\n    id: 'the-shawshank-redemption',\n    title: 'The Shawshank Redemption',\n    year: 1994,\n    director: 'Frank Darabont',\n    genre: 'Drama',\n  },\n  { id: 'fight-club', title: 'Fight Club', year: 1999, director: 'David Fincher', genre: 'Drama' },\n  { id: 'goodfellas', title: 'Goodfellas', year: 1990, director: 'Martin Scorsese', genre: 'Crime' },\n  {\n    id: 'the-silence-of-the-lambs',\n    title: 'The Silence of the Lambs',\n    year: 1991,\n    director: 'Jonathan Demme',\n    genre: 'Thriller',\n useListCollection } from '@ark-ui/react/combobox'\nimport { useFilter } from '@ark-ui/react/locale'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { useVirtualizer } from '@tanstack/react-virtual'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronsUpDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { useRef } from 'react'\nimport { flushSync } from 'react-dom'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\nexport const Virtualized = () =\u003e {\n  const contentRef = useRef\u003cHTMLDivElement | null\u003e(null)\n\n  const { startsWith } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter, reset } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems: countries,\n    filter: startsWith,\n  })\n\n  const virtualizer = useVirtualizer({\n    count: collection.size,\n    getScrollElement: () =\u003e contentRef.current,\n    estimateSize: () =\u003e 32,\n    overscan: 10,\n  })\n\n  const handleScrollToIndex: Combobox.RootProps\u003cCountry\u003e['scrollToIndexFn'] = (details) =\u003e {\n    flushSync(() =\u003e {\n      virtualizer.scrollToIndex(details.index, {\n        align: 'center',\n        behavior: 'auto',\n      })\n    })\n  }\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root\n      className={styles.Root}\n      collection={collection}\n      onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\n      scrollToIndexFn={handleScrollToIndex}\n    \u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eCountry\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Germany\" /\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Trigger className={styles.Trigger} onClick={reset}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronsUpDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.Control\u003e\n      \u003cPortal\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            \u003cdiv\n              ref={contentRef}\n              className={styles.Scroller}\n              style={{ ['--total-size' as string]: `${virtualizer.getTotalSize()}px` }}\n            \u003e\n              \u003cdiv style={{ height: virtualizer.getTotalSize(), width: '100%', position: 'relative' }}\u003e\n                {virtualizer.getVirtualItems().map((virtualItem) =\u003e {\n                  const item = collection.items[virtualItem.index]\n                  return (\n                    \u003cCombobox.Item\n                      className={styles.Item}\n                      key={item.value}\n                      item={item}\n                      aria-setsize={collection.size}\n                      aria-posinset={virtualItem.index + 1}\n                      style={{\n                        position: 'absolute',\n                        top: 0,\n                        left: 0,\n                        width: '100%',\n                        height: `${virtualItem.size}px`,\n                        transform: `translateY(${virtualItem.start}px)`,\n                      }}\n                    \u003e\n                      \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e\n                        \u003cspan aria-hidden style={{ marginRight: 8 }}\u003e\n                          {item.emoji}\n                        \u003c/span\u003e\n                        {item.label}\n                      \u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                      \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                        \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                      \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n                    \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n                  )\n                })}\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Portal\u003e\n    \u003c/Combobox.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\ninterface Country {\n  value: string\n  label: string\n  emoji: string\n}\n\nconst countries: Country[] = [\n  { value: 'AD', label: 'Andorra', emoji: '🇦🇩' },\n  { value: 'AE', label: 'United Arab Emirates', emoji: '🇦🇪' },\n  { value: 'AF', label: var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  outline: none;\n  transition:\n    border-color 0.15s ease,\n    box-shadow 0.15s ease;\n\n flex;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 2px;\n}\n\n.Trigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ClearTrigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Content {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem;\n  min-width: var(--reference-width);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-md);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  max-height: min(var(--available-height, 300px), 300px);\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  outline: none;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroup {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n\n  \u0026 + \u0026 {\n    margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroupLabel {\n  padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.025em;\n}\n\n.Item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='checked'] {\n    color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n    opacity: 0.5;\n  }\n\n  \u0026 mark {\n    background: transparent;\n    color: inherit;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    text-decoration: underline;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemText {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.ItemIndicator {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Tags {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.Tag {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  line-height: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n  background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n}\n\n.TagPlaceholder {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  min-height: 24px;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.Status {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Spinner {\n  width: 1rem;\n  height: 1rem;\n  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n}\n\n.ItemTitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.ItemSubtitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Scroller {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  height: min(300px, var(--total-size));\n  max-height: var(--available-height, 300px);\n  overflow: auto;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes spin {\n  from {\n    transform: rotate(0deg);\n  }\n  to {\n    transform: rotate(360deg);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-out {\n  from {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n  to {\n { Combobox, useListCollection } from '@ark-ui/react/combobox'\nimport { useFilter } from '@ark-ui/react/locale'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronsUpDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\nexport const CustomObject = () =\u003e {\n  const { contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems: [\n      { country: 'United States', code: 'US', flag: '🇺🇸' },\n      { country: 'Canada', code: 'CA', flag: '🇨🇦' },\n      { country: 'Australia', code: 'AU', flag: '🇦🇺' },\n    ],\n    itemToString: (item) =\u003e item.country,\n    itemToValue: (item) =\u003e item.code,\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root className={styles.Root} collection={collection} onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eCountry\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Canada\" /\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.ClearTrigger className={styles.ClearTrigger}\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.ClearTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronsUpDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.Control\u003e\n      \u003cPortal\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            {collection.items.map((item) =\u003e (\n              \u003cCombobox.Item className={styles.Item} key={item.code} item={item}\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e\n                  {item.flag} {item.country}\n                \u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                  \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Portal\u003e\n    \u003c/Combobox.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"14b:T1609,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,".Root {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\nconst cities = [\n  { label: 'New York', value: 'new-york' },\n  { label: 'Los Angeles', value: 'los-angeles' },\n  { label: 'Chicago', value: 'chicago' },\n  { label: 'Houston', value: 'houston' },\n  { label: 'Phoenix', value: 'phoenix' },\n  { label: 'Philadelphia', value: 'philadelphia' },\n  { label: 'San Antonio', { label: 'Jacksonville', value: 'jacksonville' },\n  { label: 'Fort Worth', value: 'fort-worth' },\n  { label: 'Columbus', value: 'columbus' },\n  { label: 'Charlotte', value: 'charlotte' },\n  { label: 'San Francisco', value: 'san-francisco' },\n  { label: 'Indianapolis', value: 'indianapolis' },\n  { label: 'Seattle', value: 'seattle' },\n  { label: 'Denver', value: 'denver' },\n  { label: 'Boston', value: 'boston' },\n]\n\nexport const LimitResults = () =\u003e {\n  const { contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems: cities,\n    limit: 5,\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cCombobox.Root className={styles.Root} collection={collection} onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eCity\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e{item.label}\u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems,\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const handleInputChange = (details: Combobox.InputValueChangeDetails) =\u003e {\n    filter(details.inputValue)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cField.Root className={field.Root}\u003e\n      \u003cCombobox.Root className={styles.Root} collection={collection} onInputValueChange={handleInputChange}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eDepartment\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Engineering\" /\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n            \u003cCombobox.ClearTrigger className={styles.ClearTrigger}\u003e\n              \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Combobox.ClearTrigger\u003e\n            \u003cCombobox.Trigger \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                  \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.Root\u003e\n      \u003cField.HelperText className={field.HelperText}\u003eSelect your primary department\u003c/Field.HelperText\u003e\n      \u003cField.ErrorText className={field.ErrorText}\u003eDepartment is required\u003c/Field.ErrorText\u003e\n    \u003c/Field.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\nconst initialItems = [\n  { label: 'Engineering', value: 'engineering' },\n  { label: 'Design', value: 'design' },\n  { { Combobox, useCombobox, useListCollection } from '@ark-ui/react/combobox'\nimport { useFilter } from '@ark-ui/react/locale'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronsUpDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/combobox.module.css'\n\nconst initialItems = [\n  { label: 'Designer', value: 'designer' },\n  { label: 'Developer', value: 'developer' },\n  { label: 'Product Manager', value: 'pm' },\n  { label: 'Data Scientist', value: 'data-scientist' },\n  { label: 'DevOps Engineer', value: 'devops' },\n  { label: 'Marketing Lead', value: 'marketing' },\n]\n\nexport const RootProvider = () =\u003e {\n  const { contains } = useFilter({ sensitivity: 'base' })\n\n  const { collection, filter } = useListCollection({\n    initialItems,\n    filter: contains,\n  })\n\n  const combobox = useCombobox({\n    collection,\n    onInputValueChange(details) {\n      filter(details.inputValue)\n    },\n  })\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"stack\"\u003e\n      \u003cbutton className={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e combobox.focus()}\u003e\n        Focus\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n\n      \u003cCombobox.RootProvider className={styles.Root} value={combobox}\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Label className={styles.Label}\u003eJob Title\u003c/Combobox.Label\u003e\n        \u003cCombobox.Control className={styles.Control}\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Input className={styles.Input} placeholder=\"e.g. Designer\" /\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className={styles.Indicators}\u003e\n            \u003cCombobox.ClearTrigger className={styles.ClearTrigger}\u003e\n              \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Combobox.ClearTrigger\u003e\n            \u003cCombobox.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n              \u003cChevronsUpDownIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Combobox.Trigger\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/Combobox.Control\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n          \u003cCombobox.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003cCombobox.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n              {collection.items.map((item) =\u003e (\n                \u003cCombobox.Item className={styles.Item} key={item.value} item={item}\u003e\n                  \u003cCombobox.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003e{item.label}\u003c/Combobox.ItemText\u003e\n                  \u003cCombobox.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                    \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n                  \u003c/Combobox.ItemIndicator\u003e\n                \u003c/Combobox.Item\u003e\n              ))}\n            \u003c/Combobox.Content\u003e\n          \u003c/Combobox.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003c/Portal\u003e\n      \u003c/Combobox.RootProvider\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n none;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  transition:\n    background 150ms,\n    border-color 150ms,\n    color 150ms;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1em;\n    height: 1em;\n  }\n\n  \u0026:has(\u003e svg:only-child) {\n    padding-inline: 0.625rem !important;\n  }\n\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n\n  \u0026:is(:hover, [aria-expanded='true']):not(:disabled, [data-disabled]) {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus-visible {\n    outline: 2px solid var(--demo-coral-focus-ring);\n    outline-offset: -1px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026:is(:disabled, [data-disabled]) {\n    opacity: 0.5;\n    filter: grayscale(100%);\n  }\n\n  /* Surface: outline + coral text */\n  \u0026[data-variant='surface'] {\n    border-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n    color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n  }\n\n  /* Solid: solid bg + contrast text */\n  \u0026[data-variant='solid'] {\n    background: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n    border-color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n    color: var(--demo-coral-contrast);\n\n    \u0026:hover {\n      background: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n      border-color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n    }\n\n    \u0026:focus-visible {\n      outline-offset: 2px;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n.Group {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n\n  \u0026[data-attached] {\n    gap: 0;\n\n    \u0026 \u003e :not(:first-child) {\n      margin-left: -1px;\n      border-top-left-radius: 0;\n      border-bottom-left-radius: 0;\n    }\n\n    \u0026 \u003e :not(:last-child) {\n      border-top-right-radius: 0;\n      border-bottom-right-radius: 0;\n    }\n\n    \u0026 \u003e :first-child {\n      border-top-right-radius: 0;\n none;\n}\n\n.Control {\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.Input {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  width: 100%;\n  min-width: 0;\n  height: 2.5rem;\n  padding: 0 0.75rem;\n  padding-right: 4rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  outline: none;\n  transition:\n    border-color 0.15s ease,\n    box-shadow 0.15s ease;\n\n  \u0026::placeholder {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus {\n    border-color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    opacity: 0.5;\n    filter: grayscale(100%);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-invalid] {\n    border-color: var(--demo-error);\n\n    \u0026:focus {\n      border-color: var(--demo-error);\n      box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--demo-error);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n.Indicators {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 50%;\n  right: 0.5rem;\n  transform: translateY(-50%);\n  display: flex;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 2px;\n}\n\n.Trigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ClearTrigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 0;\n\n  pointer-events: auto;\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Content {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  padding: 0.25rem;\n  min-width: var(--reference-width);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-md);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  max-height: min(var(--available-height, 300px), 300px);\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  outline: none;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroup {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n\n  \u0026 + \u0026 {\n    margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroupLabel {\n  padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.025em;\n}\n\n.Item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='checked'] {\n    color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n    opacity: 0.5;\n  }\n\n  \u0026 mark {\n    background: transparent;\n    color: inherit;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    text-decoration: underline;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemText {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.ItemIndicator {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: var(--demo-coral-solid);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.Tags {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n}\n\n.Tag {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  line-height: 1rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n  background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n}\n\n.TagPlaceholder {\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  min-height: 24px;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.Status {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Spinner {\n  width: 1rem;\n  height: 1rem;\n  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n}\n\n.ItemTitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.ItemSubtitle {\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n}\n\n.Scroller {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  height: min(300px, var(--total-size));\n  max-height: var(--available-height, 300px);\n  overflow: auto;\n  overscroll-behavior: contain;\n  scroll-padding-block: 0.25rem;\n\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized) var(--demo-bg-popover);\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes spin {\n  from {\n    transform: rotate(0deg);\n  }\n  to {\n    transform: rotate(360deg);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-out {\n  from {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n
